title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 21 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 21/12/2021
Image reference: 2021-12-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-21-2021-2_img1.png
Tanker: Mid-Age VLCC, Aframax and MR values have firmed. VLCCs Hull 8052 and Hull 8053 (300,000 DWT, May 2022, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to Greek buyers in an en bloc deal for USD 196.00 mil, VV value USD 197.18 mil - Resale, Scrubber Fitted. LR2 Prosky (115,600 DWT, Jan 2019, Daehan) sold to Neda Maritime for USD 51.00 mil, VV value USD 51.54 mil - DD Due, BWTS Fitted.
